L1_headline: + HOLX – Diana De Walt disposed of 4,416 shares (tax withholding on RSU vesting). | 01/30/2026
L2_brief: Diana De Walt, SVP of Human Resources at Hologic, disposed of 4,416 shares of common stock on 01/30/2026 at $74.93 per share (~$330,891 total value) via tax withholding upon settlement of vesting restricted stock units. Following the transaction, De Walt holds 7,603 shares directly.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Transaction was a mandatory tax withholding upon settlement of restricted stock units (transaction code F), not a discretionary sale. Shares withheld (4,416) represent a significant portion relative to post-transaction holdings (7,603), indicating a substantial RSU vesting event.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan noted; transaction code F indicates shares withheld for tax obligations — non-discretionary
Disposed shares (4,416) represent approximately 37% of pre-transaction holdings (estimated ~12,019 pre-transaction)
